perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a gray flat cap is centered in the frame, speaking and gesturing with his hands. (2) Various graphics appear overlaying the screen, including a LINE icon, an Apple Watch graphic, and text indicating a deadline of July 22nd. (3) The man continues to speak urgently, pointing towards text that explains the discontinuation of service for older LINE versions on Wear OS, followed by a 'Loading' animation and a Play Store icon.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks Mandarin in an informative and slightly urgent tone. Background music is a low-fi, mid-tempo electronic beat that remains constant. (2) Subtle sound effects like 'clicks' or 'pops' occur when text and graphics appear on screen. (3) The vocal volume remains high and clear throughout, with the music sitting consistently in the background until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '不然收不到訊息' (Otherwise can't receive messages), '有用智慧手錶連動LINE的粉絲注意了' (Attention fans using smartwatches linked to LINE). (2) Informative Text: '7月22日將終止支援' (Support will end on July 22nd), '1.4.2以下舊版本LINE應用程式' (Old version 1.4.2 or below). (3) Hook/Decorative Text: '無法連動' (Cannot link), '快點啊!' (Hurry up!) with an urgent tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Talking Head with informational graphics overlaying the narrative.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a gray flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, a purple t-shirt, and a wooden beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor setting with a plain beige wall and a lamp providing soft light in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Information -> Warning -> Instruction -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a public service announcement for tech users. The creator warns smartwatch users that LINE will cease support for older versions on the Wear OS platform by July 22nd, potentially disabling message notifications. He explains the technical details and urges viewers to update their app via the Play Store immediately.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim's signature flat cap and tech-focused advisory style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays to emphasize key points, typical of fast-paced social media information content.
